SEARCH
Package compiler.io

Class CritterLoader

java.lang.Object
compiler.io.CritterLoader
public class CritterLoader extends Object
Loads critter specifications from text files. File format: species: memsize: defense: offense: size: energy: posture:

  • Method Details

    • loadFromFile

      public static Critter loadFromFile(Path path) throws IOException
      Loads a critter from a file at the given path.
      Parameters:
      path - path to the critter file
      Returns:
      loaded critter with parsed program and attributes
      Throws:
      IOException - if file cannot be read

    • parseContent

      public static Critter parseContent(String content)
      Parses critter specification from text content.
      Parameters:
      content - text content of critter file
      Returns:
      loaded critter with parsed attributes
